title: The STARS Tour featuring Anne Wilson
description: Reserved Doors - 6:00PM Show - 7:00PM Join GRAMMY-nominated singer-songwriter Anne Wilson for the second leg of The STARS Tour, this Spring. Come get a first look at new music from her recently released album STARS, alongside fan favorites like "Rain in the Rearview', "Strong", "Hey Girl", and her multi-week No. 1 smash "My Jesus". Don't miss a powerful night of music, worship, and a look at what's to come. With special guest Peter Burton.

title: Nouveau Now
description: The UNC Charlotte Departments of Dance and Music present an enchanting production created especially for the Carolina Theatre. Celebrating the 100 year anniversary of the Martha Graham Dance Company, the program will feature Adorations, Reimagined, a beautiful Graham work reconstructed by dance professor Kim Jones. Delia Neils painterly Ode to Alphonse Mucha will immerse dancers and the audience in lush Art Nouveau, with music by Debussy, Ravel and Satie. Tamara Williamss jazz choreography will embody the fervor of Duke Ellingtons Praise God and Dance played live by the UNC Charlotte Jazz Ensemble with soprano Sequina DuBose. Ashley L. Tate will bring Nouveau Now to a powerful close with a fusion of contemporary, jazz and hip hop movement set to an electro-soul and alternative rock soundtrack.

title: Chain of Ideas: An Afternoon with Dr. Ibram X. Kendi
description: Dr. Ibram X. Kendi is one of the foremost historians in the world and leading antiracist scholars. His books have been translated into multiple languages and republished throughout the Americas, Africa, Europe, and Asia. Dr. Kendi is Professor of History and the founding director of the Howard University Institute for Advanced Study, an interdisciplinary research enterprise examining global racism. He is author of many highly acclaimed bestsellers including Stamped from the Beginning: The Definitive History of Racist Ideas in America, which won the National Book Award for Nonfiction. He is the author of the international bestseller, How to Be an Antiracist. TIME magazine named Dr. Kendi one of the 100 most influential people in the world. He was awarded a MacArthur Fellowship, popularly known as the Genius Grant. Included in the admission price, each attendee will receive a copy of Chain of Ideas: The Origins of Our Authoritarian Age ($35 value).

venue.name: The Carolina
venue.address: Carolina Theatre Charlotte Belk Place - 230 North Tryon

title: Limited Edition 100 Year Golden Replica Game Ball by Spalding®
description: THIS IS AN OPTIONAL UPGRADE. TICKET TO THE MAIN EVENT IS ALSO REQUIRED. How to Redeem Your Limited Edition 100 Year Golden Replica Game Ball by Spalding® To pick up your exclusive game ball, visit the Harlem Globetrotters Merchandise Stand located inside the venue on game day. Pick-up is only available during pre-game, half-time, or post-game. Ball MUST be picked up at the venue on the date of your ticketed event. No alternate pick-up dates, locations, nor shipping options are available. This purchase is NON TRANSFERABLE.

title: Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour Souvenir Ticket
description: THIS WILL NOT BE YOUR TICKET TO THE EVENT AND IS NOT VALID FOR ENTRY. This limited-edition Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour Souvenir Ticket is your chance to capture the legacy of the Globetrotters with your very own, 3-D printed ticket with black lanyard, delivered to you after you attend your event for a life-long collectible! All Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour Souvenir Tickets are NON-TRANSFERABLE and will NOT be available for pick-up on-site at the venue. All orders will be SHIPPED directly to the address provided at checkout within 4 weeks after the event you attend and fulfillment is coming from a third party. Actual delivery dates vary by location. The price includes shipping/handling and are only available to be shipped to the US & Canada.

title: The Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour
description: 100 Years of Thrills. 100 Years of Laughs. 100 Years of Joy. This is a once-in-a-century celebration of 100 Years of Jaw-Dropping "No Way!" moves, 100 Years of "Wow!" and 100 Years of Heart-Pounding Thrills! The Harlem Globetrotters are coming to your city with their most LEGENDARY TOUR EVER. From gravity-defying dunks to game-changing tricks, experience the team that redefined basketball! This is history you can feel and a celebration of 100 years of over-the-top FUN with all-new surprises like the Golden Basketball by Spalding®. This is fan celebration from the moment you arrive with epic new pre-game magic, unforgettable post-game interactions, and the most fan-fueled experience in sports. This is your only chance to be part of The Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the LEGACY. A warning to any fans with light sensitivity that strobing effects will be used during light shows within the Harlem Globetrotters game.

title: Anchorman: The Legend Of Ron Burgundy
description: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004) is a satirical comedy film directed by Adam McKay and starring Will Ferrell. Set in the 1970s, it follows top-rated San Diego news anchor Ron Burgundy, whose career and male-dominated newsroom are threatened by the arrival of an ambitious female co-anchor, Veronica Corningstone. Note: this is a screening of the listed film.
